name: ITmedia Inc.
summary: ITmedia Inc. engages in the development and operation of Internet-only media providing information and services centered on technology and business field in Japan. The company was formerly known as Softbank ITmedia, Inc. and changed its name to ITmedia Inc. in March 2005. ITmedia Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. ITmedia Inc. is a subsidiary of SB Media Holdings Corp.
